title: Settings Screens — Accounts, Categories, Projects
objective: Build Settings hub with dedicated screens for CRUD of Accounts, Categories, and Projects. Account creation must include opening balance field and auto-create OPENING_BALANCE transaction.
execution_steps: Create SettingsScreen as a hub navigating to AccountsManageScreen, CategoriesManageScreen, ProjectsManageScreen
Build AccountsManageScreen: list accounts, create account form (name, type picker, owner_label, opening_balance field)
On account save with opening_balance > 0: call SaveTransactionUseCase to create OPENING_BALANCE transaction (is_system_generated=1)
Build CategoriesManageScreen: list, create (name, icon, color), edit, delete
Build ProjectsManageScreen: list, create (name, start_date, end_date), edit, delete
All changes immediately available in entry form pickers via Flow
Write ViewModel unit test: creating account with opening balance creates OPENING_BALANCE transaction
Manual check: create category 'Pet Care', verify it appears in FastEntry picker
definition_of_done: Full CRUD working for all 3 entity types
Account creation with non-zero opening balance creates OPENING_BALANCE transaction
New items appear immediately in entry forms
